name: Little One Rabbit Feed - 900G
description: Developed using the finest natural ingredients and advanced nutritional science, Little One Rabbit Feed provides a rich, diverse, and highly palatable diet that closely mimics what rabbits would eat in nature. Key Benefits: 28 Biologically Appropriate Ingredients : A carefully selected mix of grasses, herbs, vegetables, fruits, and functional additives for complete nutrition. High Fibre Content : 25% aromatic meadow grasses and herbs + 16% high-quality fibre to support healthy digestion and natural foraging behaviour. Enhanced Digestibility : 17% puffed ingredients (wheat, maize, barley) for easy-to-digest proteins and carbohydrates. Taste & Variety : 16.8% vegetables and rare fruits to tempt even the fussiest eaters. Vitamin & Mineral Support : Enriched with 20 essential vitamins and minerals in highly absorbable form, including Vitamin A, D3, E, and Biotin. Skin & Coat Health : Biotin and Zinc help promote a shiny coat and healthy skin. Digestive Comfort : Contains FOS (prebiotics) for optimal gut health. Odour Control : Yucca extract helps reduce unpleasant smells. 100% Natural Approach : No artificial colours or flavours. Analytical Constituents Protein: 13.7% Fat: 4% Fibre: 16% Ash: 7% Calcium: 0.9% Phosphorus: 0.5% Ingredients Grass pellets, carob, wheat puffed, pea flakes, maize puffed, barley puffed, carrot flakes, sunflower pellets, alfalfa structure, fructooligosaccharides (FOS), yucca extract. Additives (per kg) Vitamin A: 15,000 IU | Vitamin D3: 1,100 IU | Vitamin E: 100 mg | Biotin: 300 mcg | Zinc: 50 mg | Copper: 5 mg | Iodine: 2 mg Feeding Instructions Daily feeding rate: 40g per kg of body weight . Always provide unlimited fresh hay and clean drinking water. Store in a cool, dry place. Little One Rabbit Feed is the ideal daily complete food for pet rabbits, dwarf rabbits, and lop-eared rabbits. Trusted by breeders and recommended for everyday feeding to keep your rabbits healthy, active, and happy.
